goal_text:
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the type of 'guesthouse' and should be in the 'centre'.
The hotel should 'include free parking'.
Make sure you get 'whether they have internet'.Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the type of guesthouse and should be in the centre
The hotel should include free parking
Make sure you get whether they have internet
